programme.desc: When Walter finally learns Cabe's secret about the Baghdad mission, the future of the team is threatened; Ralph puts his life in jeopardy to help the team.

programme.title: Candy Cane Christmas
programme.desc: A woman searches for a new holiday tradition after her neighbors forgo the annual Christmas festivities.

programme.title: Our Dream Christmas
programme.desc: With Gabby's mother dying, her family wants to spend one last Christmas together. Over the course of two days, Gabby uncovers the truth about her husband, defends herself against her sick, judgmental mom and faces a potential job loss.

programme.title: Marvin's Christmas
programme.desc: Marvin lives a carefree life until this Christmas when his mother insists it's time for him to move out.

programme.title: Alone for Christmas
programme.desc: When a family visits grandma's house on Christmas Eve, they leave their dog at home alone. When burglars try to take the presents from under the tree, the dog must use every trick it knows to stop them. With Kevin Sorbo.

programme.title: The Family Holiday
programme.desc: A thirty-something pool hustler stands to receive a ten-million dollar inheritance if he can prove he's forsaken his street days and settled down with a family.

programme.title: Limitless
programme.desc: A mysterious pill that enables the user to access 100% of his brain's abilities transforms a struggling writer into a financial wizard, but it also puts him in a new world with many dangers.

programme.title: Legionnaire
programme.desc: Alain is a boxer in 1925 Marseille, France. When he doesn't take the dive paid to take by a mob boss, he has to split.

programme.title: The Kill Room
programme.desc: A hitman, his boss, an art dealer and a money-laundering scheme that accidentally turns the assassin

programme.title: K-19: The Widowmaker
programme.desc: When Russia's first nuclear submarine malfunctions on its maiden voyage, the crew must race to save the ship.

programme.title: The China Syndrome
programme.desc: A reporter finds what appears to be a cover-up of safety hazards at a nuclear power plant.

programme.title: The People Across The Lake
programme.desc: A quiet community. A deadly secret. A courageous mother. A fight for their lives.

programme.title: Side Out
programme.desc: A college student comes to California for the summer and ends up playing professional volleyball.

programme.title: White Water Summer
programme.desc: A group of city boys go on a camping trip with a counselor whose enthusiasm borders on the psychotic.

programme.title: You Can't Take It With You
programme.desc: Lionel Barrymore is the eccentric patriarch of a clan of frustrated artists who decided 30 years earlier to retire from the rat race and use his fortune to encourage friends and family to pursue vocations that really interest them. At the center of his family is his granddaughter, Jean Arthur, who is carrying on a romance with her boss son, James Stewart.

programme.title: Mr. Deeds Goes To Town
programme.desc: A reluctant millionaire (Gary Cooper) is declared insane when he announces that he ll give his fortune away to America s poor. Oscar winning direction by Frank Capra.

programme.title: The Running Man
programme.desc: A young widow discovers her husband is not dead but has schemed to defraud the insurance company.

programme.title: It Should Happen To You
programme.desc: A publicity-hungry actress uses a Manhattan billboard to jumpstart her career.

programme.title: The Big Heat
programme.desc: A melodrama of dice, vice and corruption. Glenn Ford stars as a rogue homicide cop who takes the law into his own hands when he sets out to smash a vicious crime syndicate and in the process finds who planted the car bomb that killed his wife.

programme.title: Learning To Drive
programme.desc: As her marriage dissolves, a Manhattan writer takes driving lessons from a Sikh instructor with marriage troubles of his own. In each other's company they find the courage to get back on the road and the strength to take the wheel.

programme.title: City Hunter [Dubbed]
programme.desc: Jackie Chan stars as P.I. Ryu Saeba, who's been hired to find the runaway daughter of a publishing tycoon. Ryu's first impulse is to turn the job downâ€¦until he sees a picture of the beautiful girl, Shizuko.

programme.title: Alligator
programme.desc: A baby alligator is flushed down a Chicago toilet and survives by eating discarded laboratory rats injected with growth hormones. The small reptile grows gigantic, escapes the city sewers, and goes on a rampage.

programme.title: Masquerade
programme.desc: A young girl struggles to survive after a group of home invaders break in to to steal her family's priceless artwork.

programme.title: Part 1
programme.desc: Acclaimed director Franco Zeffirelli and an all-star cast come together to deliver a powerful adaptation of the Gospels in 1977's Jesus Of Nazareth. From the Nativity to the Crucifixion and Resurrection, the life of Jesus (played by Robert Powell) is presented with stunning depth, gravity, and emotion.

programme.title: The Condemned
programme.desc: Nine criminals are placed on an island. Only the last person alive in 30 hours leaves the island.

programme.title: The Condemned 2
programme.desc: In the revamped Condemned Tournament, convicts must fight to the death in a game broadcast to the public.

programme.title: Escape Plan
programme.desc: The world's authority on structural security accepts a job to break out of an ultra-secret, high-tech facility

programme.title: Escape Plan 2: Hades
programme.desc: When one of his team members goes missing, Ray Breslin must return to the hell he once escaped from.

programme.title: Escape Plan: The Extractors
programme.desc: Ray Breslin is hired to rescue the kidnapped daughter of a Hong Kong tech mogul from a Latvian prison.

programme.title: Her Deadly Game
programme.desc: When her childhood friend Kayla transfers to her college basketball team, Andrea's reunion turns into a nightmare. Kayla, obsessed with being Andrea's one and only best friend, will harm anyone who gets in her way.

programme.title: Salvation
programme.desc: A foster child bonds with a snake-handling Pentecostal community but uncovers sinister truths. She must choose between reporting pastor's crimes or preserving her newfound support system, risking personal safety for a sense of belonging.

programme.title: Best Man Dead Man
programme.desc: A bachelor party in the middle of nowhere quickly turns into a night of murder and mystery when the best man ends up with a knife in his head. Everyone is a suspect; only an eccentric private eye in town can solve the mystery.

programme.title: The Wide West
programme.desc: 1907. A mysterious gambler aids a couple of Japanese sumo wrestlers, the local Judge and a beautiful store owner against ruthless outlaws who have attacked a small Californian town.

programme.title: Joe Baby
programme.desc: A money collector for a private investigator is hired to track down 10 million dollars stolen in a dodgy real estate deal, opening a complex can of worms.

programme.title: Ip Man 2
programme.desc: Master Ip, a new arrival in British-occupied Hong Kong, wants to open a martial arts academy to teach his unique Wing Chun style. A corrupt group of martial arts masters, led by Master Hung refuses to allow him to teach in peace until he proves himself as a kung fu master.

programme.title: Ip Man 3
programme.desc: Martial-arts master Ip Man takes on a crooked developer and his gang of brutal thugs.

programme.title: Ip Man 4: The Finale
programme.desc: Ip Man and his son encounter racial discrimination after traveling to the United States to seek a better life.

programme.title: The Ming Dynasty Assassin
programme.desc: In the waning years of the Ming dynasty, influential eunuch Wei Zhongxian extends his corrupt control over state affairs for selfish gain.

programme.title: Wolf Pack
programme.desc: A physician is forced to join an elite mercenary unit in the hopes of uncovering the truth about his father's death. Soon, the group discovers a dangerous conspiracy that can threaten the lives of millions.

programme.title: Secrets to Kill For
programme.desc: Shanice joins the search for her childhood friend who is missing.

programme.title: Secret Life of the Surgeon's Wife
programme.desc: Julia suspects her dental surgeon husband is having an affair.

programme.title: Cellmate Secrets
programme.desc: Smith's former cellmates discuss her surprising antics behind bars.

programme.title: Secrets in the Foundation
programme.desc: Elena, her daughter and dad move into a new house for a fresh start.

programme.title: Secrets to Kill For
programme.desc: Shanice joins the search for her childhood friend who is missing.

programme.title: Secret Life of the Surgeon's Wife
programme.desc: Julia suspects her dental surgeon husband is having an affair.

programme.title: Cradle of Lies
programme.desc: Marissa was in a coma while pregnant and wakes up five years later to find that the baby she delivered is gone

programme.title: The Bouquet
programme.desc: Two estranged sisters set aside their differences to help their mother save her floral business.

programme.title: Love and the Radio Star
programme.desc: Hired to rebrand a radio show, Savannah finds herself falling in love after working with the host.

programme.title: FBI: Negotiator
programme.desc: An FBI agent must negotiate with a woman holding a hospital hostage in order to get her hands on an experimental drug.

programme.title: Love at the Bootcamp
programme.desc: A scattered marketing exec helps rebrand a bootcamp and discovers its strict owner may be just what she needs.

programme.title: Murder Without Motive
programme.desc: Edmund Perry has everything going for him after he graduates with a scholarship to attend Stanford. With his dedication paying off, an encounter with a police officer senselessly ends his life.

programme.title: The Code
programme.desc: A veteran thief recruits a younger crook to help him pull off one final job in order to repay his debt to the Russian mob.

programme.title: On Angel's Wings
programme.desc: When an angel grants a struggling water girl (Taylor Faye Ruffin) three wishes, even her mom (Robin Givens) or coach (Reginald VelJohnson) can't figure out how she became a soccer superstar.

programme.title: Hard Lesson
programme.desc: A Jewish parole officer, Jeff Solomon White, struggles in his new role as a reading teacher for illiterate teens at a New York high school. Raised by African American parents, White sees the situation differently and is motivated to fight for his students, who face an almost certain life of crime and prison.

programme.title: The Last Black Man in San Francisco
programme.desc: Jimmie & his best friend Mont try to reclaim the home built by Jimmie's grandfather, launching them on a poignant odyssey that connects them to their past, even as it tests their friendship & sense of belonging in the place they call home.

programme.title: Carmen and Magic
programme.desc: When Carmen meets a new friend at school named Magic, she helps raise her spirits and allows her to stand up for herself. When her single father Drew starts seeing the school principal, Magic convinces Carmen to disrupt their relationship, pulling the veil on Magic’s sinister nature.

programme.title: You Made Me This Way
programme.desc: Haunted by a failed assassination attempt, ruthless drug lord Kwame becomes obsessed with Aubrey, the woman who nearly ended his life. Consumed by revenge, he kidnaps her, setting in motion a deadly game of cat and mouse.

programme.title: Dream on Dreamer 2
programme.desc: Derrick attempts to break it off with his side-chick Keisha, but she thought she was his one and only. That is until she finds out about his fiancé Crystal. To get revenge, Keisha decides to befriend Crystal.

programme.title: The Jealous Son
programme.desc: Seduced by her boyfriend's charming son, a woman soon finds herself trapped in a dangerous obsession that will push her to her limits.

programme.title: Messy
programme.desc: After being sent away to prison for possessing a firearm, Meek Richardson returns home to the DMV to find out his associate Kevin, is killed. Meek seeks to find the truth about his friend’s death, and finds that his enemies are closer than it seems.

programme.title: Mega Shark vs Giant Octopus
programme.desc: The California coast is terrorized by two enormous prehistoric sea creatures.

programme.title: Megaboa
programme.desc: College students look for cave drawings in Columbia, but find a once-extinct and deadly 50-foot boa constrictor.

programme.title: Empire of the Sharks
programme.desc: In a water-covered future, two friends try to rescue the prisoner of a warlord who controls a shark army.

programme.title: 6 Headed Shark Attack
programme.desc: A 6-Headed Shark attacks a marriage boot camp on a remote island. No one is safe in the water, or on land.

programme.title: Zoombies 2
programme.desc: A game ranger and poachers forge an uneasy alliance as they work together to stop zombie beasts in the jungle.

programme.title: Maniac Cop
programme.desc: A killer dressed in a police uniform begins murdering innocent people on the streets of New York City.

programme.title: BODY BAGS (Edited Version)
programme.desc: Body Bags is an anthology horror film made up of three stories bookended by a creepy morgue assistant played by John Carpenter himself. The first story, The Gas Station, features Robert Carradine as a serial killer, with cameos by Sam Raimi and Wes Craven. Hair follows Stacy Keach as he receives a botched hair transplant that infests him with an alien parasite, and Eye is another transplant story, this time featuring Mark Hamill as a baseball player who loses an eye in a car accident and receives a transplant, only to be overtaken with the personality of the eye's previous owner: a murderous misogynist.

programme.title: Aenigma (Edited Version)
programme.desc: For his final horror hit of the '80s, writer/director Lucio Fulci combined elements of CARRIE, PHENOMENA and SUSPIRIA with the grisly surrealism of his own past classics for one last shocker packed with brooding, ominous imagery and signature Fulci style (The Horror Syndicate): When a bullied student at a New England girls school becomes comatose after a prank gone wrong, her tormenters will suffer graphic telepathic punishment that includes the infamous 'death by snails' scene. Jared Martin (DALLAS), Lara Lamberti (A BLADE IN THE DARK) and Ulli Reinthaler (ZOMBIE 3) star in this blast from start to finish, with some of the most bonkers imagery Fulci ever put on film (The Video Vacuum) co-written by Giorgio Mariuzzo (THE BEYOND, HOUSE BY THE CEMETERY).

programme.title: The Loch Ness Monster
programme.desc: In the arena of cryptozoology, few creatures have captured the imagination like the Loch Ness Monster. Sightings and stories of this beast of lore go back decades. Also known as Nessie for short, this creature is said to occupy Loch Ness in the Scottish Highlands and is often described as massive and long-necked. Widespread interest and belief in the Monster have increased significantly since it was brought to worldwide attention in 1933. Evidence of its presence is anecdotal, with several disputed photos and sonar examinations, but does the Loch Ness Monster really exist? Follow us as we deep dive into the facts.

programme.title: Castle of the Creeping Flesh
programme.desc: In an ancient castle, a mad scientist is trying to revive his dead daughter by way of an operation. However, there are certain body parts he needs that he is unable to get. Fortunately for the scientist, his problem is solved when a group of unfortunate and drunken party-goers stumble into his castle.

programme.title: Maniac Cop
programme.desc: A killer dressed in a police uniform begins murdering innocent people on the streets of New York City.

programme.title: Housemaid, The (2018)
programme.desc: On a plantation in 1953 Indochina, a troubled young housemaid finds comfort in the arms of the widowed owner, until his deceased wife returns to object.

programme.title: Consecration
programme.desc: After her brother dies under strange circumstances, Grace travels to the Mount Saviour Convent for answers. Once there, she uncovers murder, sacrilege, and a shocking truth about her past.

programme.title: Horror's Greatest
programme.desc: A great animal attack movie pushes all of our human-against-nature buttons. From demented sharks to unhinged chimps, this episode sorts out the leaders of the cinematic pack. We also shame the worst horror pets (and give treats to the best).

programme.title: Horror's Greatest
programme.desc: Dates in horror are worst-case scenarios that go way past awkward silences. Your lovemate is either a serial killer, a tormented psychic, or comes from a family that wants to hunt you for sport. Looking for love inevitably leads to blood and carnage.

programme.title: Horror's Greatest
programme.desc: What special film would you recommend to the ghoul who has "seen everything?" In this episode, genre mavens select 13 movies that have been forgotten, overlooked, unfairly maligned, or are hard to find - 13 bloody gems hidden beneath the floorboards.

programme.title: Horror's Greatest
programme.desc: From King Kong's epic orchestra to the unnerving electronics of Under the Skin, composers have used every style of music to frighten audiences. Horror scores blaze trails, bringing new instruments and radical musical forms into popular consciousness.

programme.title: Horror's Greatest
programme.desc: Alien. 2001. Forbidden Planet. Many of the greatest sci-fi movies ever made are also horror films. The vastness of space, the claustrophobia of space travel, and the inconceivable horrors that might lurk in the void make for spine-tingling filmmaking

programme.title: Contorted
programme.desc: Based on the novel 'The Contorted House', the winner of 'Safehouse Horror Competition Prize'. An unorthodox house drags a family into a dreadful tragedy.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Gets the Misery" - Jed cheers up Granny by pretending to be sick so she can doctor him. Soon Drysdale and his doctor, Clyburn, are subject to her methods as well.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro brings home a friend, Armstrong Dueser McHugh III, who is coddled by a chauffeur who treats him as frail. The Clampetts know better, and show him a good time, friendship and family.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Miss Hathaway gets sick and Mr. Drysdale has to speak at a conference, Jed helps out by running the bank and having Elly be his secretary, while Jethro finds a speech that Drysdale accidentally uses instead of his own. All the while a new teller sucks-up to the men and flirts with the women.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Psychiatrist Gets Clampetted" - Jethro finally gets his bill of health from Dr. Twombly so he can graduate the fifth grade, but Twombly really wants to talk to Grannie again. Drysdale brings him to the Clampetts' just as Grannie showed Pearl how to use a love potion, so everyone thinks Twombly's interest in Grannie is love.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Get Psychoanalyzed" - Jethro needs a health certificate to graduate from the fifth grade, so he goes to the only doctor the Clampetts know about - Mrs. Drysdale's psychiatrist. He gets nowhere with Jethro, so Pearl comes and she thinks he is testing her virtue when he tries to lay her on his couch.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts in Court" - When a couple who ran into the Clampett's car discover that they're rich, they fake injuries and sue the Clampetts.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Entertain" - Jed arranges a party to get Grannie out of her doldrums and invites the Drysdale. But when Mr. Drysdale's boss comes and wants to meet them for dinner, he wonders if he's going to be sent to an Alaskan bank when his boss finds out he's been lying about Jed and his family being sophisticated.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Duke Becomes a Father" - Mlle. Denise comes back for the birth of her dog's puppies, and to see Jed. They do some "courtin' and sparkin'" Mrs. Drysdale isn't nearly so happy when she finds the puppies share more in common with Duke the bloodhound than Claude the poodle.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts and the Dodgers" - Jed and Jethro go golfing with Leo Durocher, coach of the Los Angeles Dodgers, who wants to recruit Jethro as a pitcher when he sees how well he can throw.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Pays His Income Tax" - When an IRS agent gets chased away by Granny, Mr. Drysdale tells him the story of how the Clampetts came to be rich and move to Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Granny's Spring Tonic" - Miss Hathaway's brilliant-but-frumpy bank protegee Gloria is really a sultry gold-digger with eyes for Jed's $34 million, and Jed's just had his annual dose of Granny's spring tonic.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Cuts the Family Tree" - Mrs. Drysdale continues to be forced into doing "practices from the past" by Mrs. Smith-Standish, who discovers that Jed's family is possibly the first to come the country. If so they'd be famous worldwide, but does Jed want that?

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Family Tree" - Mrs. Drysdale wants to get rid of the Clampetts before the arrival of Mrs. Smith-Standish, the head of a 'first family' historical society. Starring Bob Steele and Sterling Holloway, directed by Robert Emmett Tansey. 1945 (Color).

programme.title: Robin Hood of the Pecos
programme.desc: Roy Rogers finds himself elected sheriff in a wild Texas town after the Civil War. But can Roy handle a place under martial law? And can he save Gabby Hayes from being executed? And how many songs will he get to sing? Clear the burrs from your saddle and get ready for a good one, also starring Marjorie Reynolds, plus Sally Payne as Belle Starr, Queen of the Oklahoma Outlaws!

programme.title: The Hanged Man
programme.desc: After a condemned gunfighter (Steve Forrest) survives his own hanging, he helps a young widow stop a pitiless land baron from taking her ranch. This television feature boasts a strong cast of recognizable characters, including Will Geer, Sharon Acker, Dean Jagger, BarBara Luna, and Cameron Mitchell. Director Michael Caffey would go on to work on such hit shows as Barnaby Jones and MacGyver. Also, look for John Mitchum, younger brother of Robert, in a small role. This movie originally aired on ABC-TV and was considered the pilot for a possible series. Writer/producer Andrew Fenady was behind several opular TV shows such as Branded and The Rebel, as well as the 1970 John Wayne feature, Chisum.

programme.title: Tulsa
programme.desc: Susan Hayward stars in this dramatic tale of the Oklahoma oil boom. She plays Cherokee Lansing, a determined young woman out to protect her father's honor after he's killed by men from a competing oil company. With a cast that includes Robert Preston, Ed Begley, and Pedro Armendariz, this engaging picture from producer Walter Wanger (Cleopatra, I Want to Live!) was nominated for an Academy Award in the Special Effects category. Also, listen for veteran character actor Chill Wills as the narrator!

programme.title: Under California Stars
programme.desc: Disaster strikes when Roy Rogers's beloved horse Trigger is stolen and held for ransom money. Will Roy find $100,000 to get his faithful companion back, or will he find a way to trap the gang holding the horse hostage? Along with Roy and Trigger, you'll find Andy Devine as Cookie Bullfincher, and young Michael Chapin as Ted Carver, a gallant boy who helps reunite Roy with the smartest horse in show business!

programme.desc: Jim Bruer's Heavy Metal Comedy was born on December 9th, 2000 when Jim unleashed his Rock-n-Comedy assault on an unsuspecting, standing room only crowd at New York City's, Irving Plaza. New routines such as Coming Home at 4am have already become cult faves and Bruer favorites like The Party have received a musical facelift. Jim's uncanny impressions, such as Brian Johnson of AC/DC, are also included.

programme.title: David Heti: It Was Ok
programme.desc: With a sly, biting wit, Heti's truths cut close to the bone, hewing to reality in all its complexity and madness.

programme.title: Mike Stanley: Salty Language, Peppered Morals
programme.desc: An alternately serious and silly documentary short gives a backstage look at comics' life on the road.

programme.title: Live at The Stand: Passed

programme.desc: Graham Kay delivers observational humor and sarcastic charm, taking on everyday topics from surviving a breakup in New York City to tracing-paper pornography.

programme.title: Maria Bamford: Plan B

programme.title: Upstairs @ The Stand

programme.title: Jeff Dunham: Controlled Chaos
programme.desc: Jeff Dunham is back in his much-anticipated fourth concert event.

programme.title: My Sassy Girl
programme.desc: A sweet Midwestern guy with his life planned out for himself is wooed, groomed.

programme.title: Young People F'ing
programme.desc: On a Tuesday night, five couples have separate sexual adventures

programme.title: A Shock To The System
programme.desc: When electrocuted by the basement fuse box at home, Graham Marshall develops sinister ideas concerning both his nagging wife Leslie and his colleague Robert Benham, who was given Graham's promotion at their corporate office.

programme.title: Perrier's Bounty
programme.desc: A gangster named Perrier looks to exact his revenge on a trio of fugitives responsible for the accidental death of one of his cronies.

programme.title: Fifty Shades Of Black
programme.desc: An inexperienced college student meets a wealthy businessman whose sexual practices put a strain on their relationship.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon joins Clinton Kelly and Stacy London for a July Fourth-themed episode where he teaches the notoriously non-cooking Stacy how to grill skirt steak with a quick charred corn salsa featuring tomatillos, jalapeños, and garlic. The episode showcases fundamental cooking techniques including seasoning, temperature control, and proper resting. Stacy surprises the group with an air fryer and attempts to make dairy-free s'mores using gluten-free cookies and specialty peanut butter cups, leading to comedic mishaps. The hosts also discuss their new show "Why'd They Wear That," where they critique character wardrobes from films and television. The episode emphasizes that cooking is about patience, proper technique, and feeding people you care about.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon and Clinton Kelly welcome back chef Ariane Duarte for an episode focused on effortless summer cooking. Duarte demonstrates her signature one-pan scallop recipe featuring Jersey cherry tomatoes and fresh corn, emphasizing technique-forward but quick preparation. She shares pro tips on drying scallops for proper searing, building flavor through layered seasoning, and understanding the importance of pan temperature. The hosts discuss the versatility of the dish, noting it can be adapted with shrimp, snapper, halibut, or local New Jersey fish like fluke or stripers. Between cooking segments, the trio play a "This or That" game and discuss meaningful conversations with strangers, touching on mindfulness and the importance of slowing down.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: In this summer picnic episode, Michael Symon and Clinton Kelly are joined by celebrated chef Ayesha Nurdjaja to explore classic picnic fare with cultural roots. Ayesha shares her family's cherished recipe for a Potato Egg Provolone Semolina Hero, a humble yet satisfying dish that speaks to her Brooklyn heritage and Italian-Indonesian background. The hosts discuss picnic traditions, sandwich preferences, and the art of making the perfect egg dish. The episode includes a blind taste-identification game with picnic basket items and closes with fan mail discussing induction stoves, overhyped foods, and emerging culinary talents to watch.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: The Chewed Up Show dives into world-class dips with hosts Michael Symon and Clinton Kelly, joined by guest Ayesha Nurdjaja. Clinton prepares a simple homemade tzatziki with Greek yogurt, cucumber, garlic, and fresh herbs, discussing how it's become a healthy staple in his household. Carla brings a grilled corn dip featuring mayo, sour cream, scallions, cilantro, and charred corn. Michael shares a Cleveland clam dip recipe—a regional specialty featuring diced clams, bacon, dill, and sour cream. The hosts discuss dip culture, texture preferences, and creative variations like using kohlrabi and roasted beets. Between recipes, they play never-have-I-ever games and answer fan questions about dessert preferences and vacation spots.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon, Clinton Kelly, and Carla Hall welcome renowned chef Marco Canora, founder of Brodo bone broth and executive chef of Hearth restaurant in New York City. Canora shares how broth became central to his wellness journey and cooking philosophy. The hosts and guest prepare a roasted half-chicken with a pan sauce made from brodo, demonstrating how quality broth elevates home cooking. The episode includes a NYC food-themed "Chew It or Screw It" game and explores Canora's approach to seasonal, farm-to-table cooking. Canora reveals creative applications of broth, including savory beverage variations with olive oil, bacon fat, and other ingredients.

programme.title: Simply Symons
programme.desc: In the debut episode of Simply Symons, Michael Symon welcomes viewers into his Venice, California front yard alongside his wife Liz Symon and their friend Olivia Annacone Cisic for an unfiltered, laid-back cookout. Celebrating Cinco de Mayo, Michael prepares simple yet flavorful black cod fish tacos on a plancha, walking through his approach to seasoning, cooking fish by sight, and building a bright, crunchy slaw with cabbage, citrus, and charred poblanos. The conversation flows easily as the trio shares cooking tips, debates ingredients like corn versus flour tortillas, and jokes about knife sharpening habits, cilantro preferences, and home cooking realities. Liz complements the meal with a refreshing jalapeño margarita, balancing heat with fresh lime juice, simple syrup, and a hint of orange liqueur, while adding her own creative twist with lemon and bitters. Throughout the episode, the group emphasizes flexibility in cooking—encouraging viewers to adjust flavors, garnishes, and spice levels to their own tastes. Lighthearted banter continues as they assemble tacos, discuss plating ideas, and highlight optional additions like crema and avocado. The episode wraps with a taste test, enthusiastic reactions to both the tacos and cocktail, and a reminder that great food doesn’t have to be complicated—just fresh, simple, and made with joy.

programme.title: Simply Symons
programme.desc: Michael Symon, Liz Symon, and Olivia Annacone Cisic tackle a brunch-inspired twist on eggs Benedict by swapping traditional Canadian bacon for crispy pastrami and pairing it with a mustard-spiked hollandaise sauce. Michael walks through a foolproof blender hollandaise method while explaining the science behind emulsifying butter and keeping the sauce warm, making the intimidating brunch staple feel approachable for home cooks. As the family cooks together, the conversation bounces between Olivia’s skepticism about poached eggs, Liz’s love of runny yolks, and memories of iconic pastrami spots like Langer’s and Katz’s. The group also debates poaching techniques, from classic whirlpool methods to muffin tin hacks for feeding a crowd. Humor carries the episode throughout as Michael teases Olivia’s picky eating habits and the family jokes about “buttering muffins” and hollandaise disasters. Liz complements the rich brunch dish with a citrus-forward mimosa made from blood oranges, sumo oranges, lemon juice, and frozen strawberries used as flavorful ice cubes. Once plated, the pastrami Benedict wins Olivia over completely, with the crispy pastrami and tangy mustard hollandaise becoming the standout combination. The episode wraps with the family enjoying brunch cocktails, discussing make-ahead egg tips, and Michael reminding viewers that restaurant-quality brunch can come together quickly and simply at home.

programme.title: Simply Symons
programme.desc: Michael Symon kicks off a new era of Simply Symons from Venice, California, joined by Liz Symon and Olivia “Liv” Annacone Cisic for a laid-back backyard cookout centered around the ultimate burger debate: smash burgers versus classic pub burgers. Michael walks through the techniques behind each style, from selecting the ideal fat ratio for ground beef to achieving the perfect crust on a hot grill and cast iron griddle. Along the way, the trio shares stories about old Symon’s Dinners episodes, Liv’s transition into motherhood, and the realities of filming outdoors with planes overhead, lawn equipment buzzing nearby, and neighborhood life unfolding around them. As Michael builds both burgers with grilled onions, pickles, secret sauce, and different cheeses, the conversation turns into a humorous discussion about condiments, cooking preferences, smash burger myths, and burger nostalgia. Liz keeps the energy going with playful jabs at Michael while also preparing his favorite cocktail, the bourbon-based Paper Plane, complete with Aperol, Amaro, and fresh lemon juice. The episode wraps with a tasting session comparing both burgers side-by-side, with everyone weighing in on which version wins the battle. Between the casual banter, cooking tips, and family-style atmosphere, the episode delivers an easygoing and highly approachable backyard burger feast.

programme.title: Simply Symons
programme.desc: In this Memorial Day-themed episode of Simply Symons, Michael Symon cooks outdoors with his wife Liz and co-host Olivia Annacone Cisic, preparing grilled shrimp skewers with a honey-soy-orange glaze, a pineapple salsa, and a coconut rice pilaf, while Liz mixes up a frothy pineapple daiquiri with an egg-white twist. The episode opens with playful banter about Olivia's discovery of gray hairs at 33, her upcoming bachelorette party plans, and Michael's gentle ribbing of the trio's early-dinner, early-bedtime lifestyle. Michael walks through his Memorial Day menu, highlighting a coconut rice made with jasmine rice, coconut milk, and a coconut curry lime bone broth from friend Marco Canora's brand Brodo, plus a bright pineapple salsa built with cilantro, scallion, red pepper, jalapeño, honey, and a dashi soy sauce sourced from Santa Monica's McCall's butcher. A lively debate breaks out over rice ratios and rinsing technique, with Liz advocating for a 1:1¾ ratio while Michael sticks to his two-to-one method, and Olivia sharing that she recently cooked jasmine rice for her unwell dog Zeke. Throughout the cooking session, mishaps and humor keep things lively — limes refuse to juice, Liz nearly topples the dashi bottle, and Michael accidentally steps on their dog Min. Discussions range from shrimp varieties and sizing (the U-number system), to the fruity heat of jalapeños and habaneros, to favorite hot sauces including Crystal and the Florida datil-pepper-based Zabs. Liz's honest palate becomes a recurring theme, with Michael crediting her direct, critical feedback as a key ingredient in his culinary success over the years. Liz dry-shakes her egg-white pineapple daiquiri before adding ice for a frothy finish, then adjusts the balance mid-tasting by swirling in extra pineapple juice. The shrimp grill up with beautiful caramelization from the honey glaze, and the coconut rice is finished simply with cilantro and cracked black pepper. During the final tasting, Olivia — a self-described texture-averse pasta lover — bravely tries the shrimp, endorsing the flavors while admitting she prefers the coconut rice. Michael closes the episode wishing viewers a happy Memorial Day and reminding them to keep things simple and delicious.

programme.title: Simply Symons
programme.desc: Michael Symon grills a spatchcock chicken with avgolemono sauce in his Venice Beach front yard, joined by his wife Liz and co-host Liv. The episode features a lavender lemon drop martini and explores grill techniques for perfectly crispy, juicy poultry.

programme.title: Simply Symons
programme.desc: In this Simply Symons episode, hosts Michael and Liz Symon, alongside Liv Annacone, prepare a summer-inspired dish featuring seared halloumi cheese topped with warm strawberries, fresh mint, pistachios, and a red wine vinaigrette infused with honey and cracked black pepper. Liz creates a homemade strawberry simple syrup using fresh and frozen strawberries, which becomes the base for a refreshing strawberry vodka martini garnished with mint. The hosts discuss the unique properties of halloumi—a Cypriot cheese that doesn't melt and develops a savory crust when seared—and explore the classic pairing of sweet and salty flavors. They also share storage tips for fresh herbs and berries, mention the superior quality of local Harry's berries, and discuss favorite summer TV shows.

programme.title: Simply Symons
programme.desc: In this episode of Simply Symons, hosts Michael Symon and Liz Symon, joined by Liv Annacone, bring the show indoors to cook during warm weather. Michael creates an elevated crab grilled cheese sandwich using mascarpone, jumbo lump crab meat, Old Bay seasoning, tarragon mustard, and pickled red onions, with parmigiano-reggiano crust for extra crispness. Meanwhile, Liz prepares an orange whip cocktail with a modern twist, substituting tangerine juice for traditional orange juice and combining vodka, rum, Grand Marnier, and heavy cream. The episode showcases kitchen techniques like gentle folding to preserve crab lumps and discusses alternative grilled cheese fillings, while celebrating nostalgic Cleveland dining memories and mall culture.

programme.title: Simply Symons
programme.desc: On Father's Day, Michael Symon prepares his ideal meal featuring a dry-aged prime ribeye steak seasoned with beef tallow, kosher salt, and pepper, grilled to a perfect char. He creates a vibrant salsa verde with anchovies, capers, fresh herbs (tarragon, parsley, mint), and red wine vinegar to complement the rich beef. Liz Symon crafts an equal-parts cocktail combining bourbon, amaro, and blood orange juice with cold brew coffee, garnished with a blood orange peel and crunchy salt. Michael also grills bitter endive with olive oil and finishes plates with orange segments. Throughout, the hosts discuss beef tallow versus olive oil, charcoal selection, proper salt techniques, and how the steak's varying fat content creates different doneness levels across a single cut.

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: "Pork and Chive Dumplings with Chris Ying" - Chris Ying has made a lot of dumplings in his day. In fact, he always keeps a batch in the freezer for whenever the kids need a quick dinner. Today, he shares his go-to pork dumpling recipe, including two quick sauces.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Cooking Show
programme.desc: "John Heilemann" - Journalist, author and entrepreneur John Heilemann comes by the studio as Dave tries to conjure memories of some of John's childhood food memories.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Cooking Show

programme.title: The Dave Chang Cooking Show
programme.desc: "Garrett Leight" - Eyewear entreprenuer and Row DTLA neighbor Garrett Leight comes to the temporary studio as Dave attempts to create a meal inspired by Garrett's Mexican American and Jewish heritage.

programme.desc: For your next tailgate, let Los Angeles' Asian flavors inspire you.

programme.desc: Emeri's tailgate menu is inspirated by flavors (and favorite sandwiches) of Philadelphia.

programme.title: Emeril Tailgates
programme.desc: For a Seattle style tailgate, Emeril whips up his crowd-pleasing cedar planked salmon.

programme.title: Emeril Tailgates

programme.title: Emeril Tailgates

programme.title: Emeril Tailgates
programme.desc: Emeril and Buffalo Bills superfan Lindsey Kszos takes inspiration from her city's famous wings.

programme.title: Emeril Tailgates

programme.title: Emeril Cooks
programme.desc: Emeril and Kimberly Patton-Bragg create a holiday menu around New Orleans' official cocktail, the Sazerac.

programme.title: Emeril Cooks
programme.desc: Subtley sweet, Emeril shows you how to make the most of figs.

programme.title: Emeril Cooks
programme.desc: Emeril celebrates the flavorful Creole tomato, grown from rich soil of the Mississippi Delta.

programme.title: Emeril Cooks
programme.desc: We've all heard of soft shell crab, but did you know there's also soft shell shrimp?

programme.title: Emeril Cooks
programme.desc: Emeril highlights Morning Glory, an invasive vegetable grown only by special permission.

programme.title: Emeril Cooks
programme.desc: Emeril, Lindsey Brower, and Nan Wallis create a mouth-watering meal inspired by locally-brewed sake.

programme.title: Nick Stellino: Storyteller in the Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Stellino attempts to answer the age old question - which is better - bacon or pancetta? Dishes include: Ragu' Di Gamberetti/ Shrimp Amatriciana with Pasta / Insalata Del Sogno / Watermelon Salad with Tomato and Bacon.

programme.title: Nick Stellino: Storyteller in the Kitchen
programme.desc: Nick recounts the first time a group of friends treated him to his first American breakfast and the influence it had on him as a chef. Dishes include: Eggs Benedict "Stellino Style" / Poached Eggs over Chorizo Hash with Tequila Sauce / Chocolate Chip Pancakes.

programme.title: Nick Stellino: Storyteller in the Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Stellino tells us about the time his parents visited him in America and he brought them to a Steak House with a surprising menu choice from his late father. Dishes include: Reverse Sear Steak with Port Wine Sauce and Pan Fried Mushroom and Arugula / Wedge Salad.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: Lidia believes in cooking according to season, and when springtime comes, she and her family all work together to create a beautiful garden. In this episode, she shares four recipes that celebrate the bounty of the summertime garden: Tuna Salad with Boiled Zucchini, String Bean Salad with Capers and Basil, Whole Wheat Couscous with Cucumbers, and finally Shells with Chicken and Zucchini.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: Today, Lidia serves a beautiful Striped Bass with Tomato Pesto over a bed of fennel as the star of the meal. She then creates a tasty dish of Mint String Beans. For dessert, summer is still the theme with Peach Granita, although the granita technique can be made with all kinds of seasonal fruits.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: Lidia creates a Tomato and Mint Salad, Tomato and Ricotta Crostini, and Spaghetti with Quick Pantry Sauce, before finishing with a Gluttonous Tomato - a perfect appetizer or lunch dish.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: There is nothing better than a great piece of meat! In today's episode, Lidia takes a less expensive cut, London Broil, and marinates it to perfection. Her menu includes a delicious Vegetable Patty served with green salad which works as an appetizer or by itself as a quick lunch; London Broil with Sundried Tomato Marinade and one of her Grandma Rosa's favorites, Corn and Walnut Cake.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: It's all about fresh seafood in this episode with three of Lidia's most requested fish recipes: Clam Bruschetta features crusty Italian bread, still warm from the grill with clam sauce; Halibut Baked with Mushrooms in a Lemon and White Wine Sauce is a great weeknight meal as is Grouper with Potatoes and Peppers.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: Are you always in a rush to prepare something quick yet delicious for dinnertime? Lidia shares three of her favorite quick and simple meal ideas, all of which can work as an appetizer, a lunch or a quick dinner. They include: Scallops, Scallion and Mushrooms; Chicken Breasts with Orange and Gaeta Olives; Tuna with Mimosa Sauce.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: Garlic and Onions appear in many Italian dishes, and in this episode they actually become the "star ingredients." Lidia starts the meal with a quick and easy Savory Onion Tart followed by a delicious, mild and creamy Garlic Risotto. For dessert, it's all about chocolate with the moist Torta Caprese.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: There is nothing more delicious than butterflied poultry with super crispy chicken. In this episode, Lidia starts with a Spicy Butterflied Cornish Hen made with hot cherry peppers, rosemary and wine. She then pulls out the beer to add to her Potatoes Baked in Beer. Our favorite Grandma Erminia joins Lidia to taste the Squash and Ricotta Tart.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: It's all about family in this episode as Lidia shares three of her favorite family recipes. Marinated Meatballs, Zucchini Parmigiana, Artichoke Carbonara and Jam Filled Mezzaluna are the stars of this episode.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: In Ciudad Juárez, Pati joins in with a group of Pachuco dancers, who are passionately preserving this distinctive Prohibition-era culture's traditions. Together they head to the iconic Kentucky Bar, rumored to be the birthplace of the margarita. programme.title: The Tall Texan
programme.desc: Sheriff Chadbourne (Samuel Herrick) transports convict Ben Trask (Lloyd Bridges) to El Paso in a covered wagon. The wagon also carries sea captain Theodore Bess (Lee J. Cobb) and married couple Laura (Marie Windsor) and Jerry Niblett (Dean Train). The group comes upon a wounded Native American, banished by his tribe, who offers to lead them to gold. But then the tribe attacks the wagon, killing Jerry and wounding Chadbourne. Ben is freed to help, but the group's troubles have only begun.

programme.title: Gunfight at Comanche Creek
programme.desc: In 1875, a band of brutal bandits craft a dastardly scheme. First they bust a convicted man out of jail, and then they force him to commit a string of robberies to increase the price on his head. Finally, they murder him and collect the bounty. Lawman Bob Gifford (Audie Murphy) is onto their vicious plan, and he goes undercover as a prisoner to lure in these savage villains. But he struggles to stay focused after crossing paths with a sweet saloon owner (Colleen Miller).

programme.title: Underwater Paradise

programme.title: The Super Simple Show - Underwater
programme.desc: This compilation is about Underwater! Includes children's songs "Baby Shark", "Sailor Went To Sea" and More!

programme.title: Carl's Big Adventure - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Carl is visited by three large, very dirty construction vehicles. But Carl’s Car Wash is not big enough to fit them! Carl has an idea! He can supersize his car wash so the vehicles can get a proper scrub-a-dub-dub. He just needs a few parts. With the help of old friends, Carl sets out on a big adventure to the darkest depths of the ocean, the highest heights in the land, and beyond! Don't miss Carl in his first mini-movie as he pushes himself to the limit in the name of vehicular cleanliness!

programme.title: The Super Simple Show - Counting and Numbers
programme.desc: The Super Simple show is a compilation of Super Simple’s most popular songs and series that our fans love! This compilation is all about Numbers and Counting! Includes children's song favorites "10 Little Buses", “10 In the Bed” & "10 Little Dinosaurs" and featuring Carl's Car Wash, The Bumble Nums, Sing Along With Tobee, and More!

programme.title: Finny's First Day Of School - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Finny is a bit nervous on the first day of school, but Myrtle the Turtle is even more anxious and literally hides her shell! Surely Myrtle will come out of her shell when their teacher, a whale named Mr. Magellan, has them draw and present their favorite things to the class! Nope. Myrtle is even more nervous than ever! Being a good friend, Finny helps Myrtle through her anxiety, and the tiny turtle finally shows her drawing to everyone.

programme.title: The Bumble Nums - Super Simple Collection 1
programme.desc: Once Humble, Grumble, and Stumble make it to their kitchen with ingredient intact, it's time to make the dish.

programme.title: Baby Shark - Finny The Shark and more
programme.desc: Baby Shark, Mama Shark, Papa Shark, Grandma Shark, and Grandpa Shark are out for a family swim and Baby Shark tries and tries to catch the little fishies but his skills aren’t yet up to the task. Just when he thinks he finally has them a (very big) friend of the little fishies steps in to save the day!

programme.title: Dharma's Digger - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Oh no! While digging deep at a top secret construction site, Dhama’s digger gets splashed with smelly sludge! Everyone says that Carl's Car Wash is the place to get all cleaned up, so Dharma skedaddles over to see how Carl can help. With a quick mess assessment and a few twists of some knobs, Carl’s suds-sational car wash is ready to give Dharma’s vehicle a good scrub-a-dub! Dharma rolls out one happy customer, and ready to get back to work on the site that Carl is itching to see!

programme.title: The Bumble Nums - Super Simple Collection 2
programme.desc: The Bumble Nums are back with all new adventures! Join Humble, Stumble and Grumble as they bounce, climb, fly.

programme.title: Mr. Golden Sun - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Mister Sun, Sun, Mr. Golden Sun...please shine down on me! It’s the Mr. Sun song from Super Simple Songs!

programme.title: Finny's First Sleepover - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: It’s Finny’s first sleepover and Finny is nervous to sleep at Myrtle the Turtle’s house. Throughout the night, Finny becomes more and more comfortable and after a spooky story, Finny becomes the bravest of everyone at the sleepover! Finny can't wait to do a sleepover again – but this time, at Finny’s house!

programme.title: Enchanted Ice Cream - Super Simple
programme.desc: Today, the Bumble Nums are going to make Enchanted Ice Cream Sundaes! With a map in hand, Humble, Grumble, and Stumble search the orchard for the secret ingredient … and discover a fairy treehouse leading to an enchanted world! The Bumble Nums travel through the portal…but do they find the ingredient they’re looking for? And can they get it back to the kitchen in time for the Cooking Countdown? Watch and see!

programme.title: Hello Hello! - Super Simple Puppets and more
programme.desc: Sing and dance along with the Super Simple Puppets to “Hello Hello!”! It’s a classic Super Simple action song for kids.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones become increasingly mobile, their fascination with all things that move intensifies too. On the Go: Riding, Sailing and Soaring exposes babies to the different ways people travel -- on land, by sea, and in the air -- while it presents them with captivating real-world images, funny puppet shows, and beautiful classical music by Beethoven, Haydn, Mozart and Rossini.

programme.title: Cal's Sound Yard
programme.desc: Cal's Sound Yard is a new animated series from Baby Einstein that introduces the letters of the alphabet and the sounds they make. Why all the tracing and repetition? And why are the letters out of order? Don't worry! There's a reason for all that; the content is based on "The Einstein Way" - a curiosity-driven learning philosophy, from industry experts, inspired by Montessori and STEAM.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Share a rainbow of sights and sounds with your baby as you discover the wonders of color together! Join puppet host "Vincent Van Goat" as he creates six Van Gogh masterpieces exploring red, green, blue, yellow, orange, and purple. World Of Colors is a spirited celebration of creative expression.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones' curiosity about the world blossoms, you can help sow the seeds of discovery with Baby MacDonald: A Day on the Farm. Featuring live-action images, nursery rhymes and fun-filled puppet shows, this playful, interactive program introduces little ones to the exciting sights and sounds of a real working farm.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Within the first year of babies' lives, their physical development begins to kick into high gear as they explore ways to physically interact with the world around them. BABY'S FIRST MOVES is a joyful celebration of their movement milestones -- including first steps, clapping, jumping, dancing and more.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Discover the wonderful world of water and deep dive into all the amazing creatures that call the ocean home. Learn simple words about the sea like water, coral reef, and ocean through narration and repetition. Engaging live-action footage of your favorite ocean friends and classical melodies will dazzle your little explorer as they experience the magical world under the sea.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Enjoy the best of summer, autumn and winter with Baby Einstein! Discover the familiar sights and sounds of the different seasons. Learn names of common objects associated with each through repetition and narration and see engaging images of whimsical toys that celebrate each. Discover the magic of each season from falling leaves, rolling beach balls and even snowmen.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Discover sign language! Enjoy upbeat, classical melodies as you learn how to sign words and activities related to common main street businesses, where your food comes from, activities related to dining out and more. Learn through real-life footage, narration, and repetition.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Every stage is an exciting adventure with your newborn. As babies grow, they absorb a wide variety of sights and sounds. And with so much to see and hear, infants seem to enjoy, and be most soothed by, gentle sounds such as your voice or pleasant, restful music. Treat your child -- and yourself -- to the delights of Baby Bach Musical Adventure, an award-winning program that exposes babies to the joy and majesty of classical music while presenting them with stimulating, colorful images.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones grow, their innate sense of wonder grows too, creating an occasion for celebration with each new discovery. Baby Galileo Discovering the Sky introduces them to that remarkable canopy above us: the sun and moon, fluffy clouds, shimmering stars, colorful planets and whirling galaxies.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones' curiosity about the world blossoms, you can help sow the seeds of discovery with Baby MacDonald: A Day on the Farm. Featuring live-action images, nursery rhymes and fun-filled puppet shows, this playful, interactive program introduces little ones to the exciting sights and sounds of a real working farm.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies turn one year old, they continue to develop their communication skills. Meanwhile, with you as their guide, they also begin to explore the world beyond their front door. Baby's Favorite Places presents them with a playful introduction to 20 words for the names of familiar locations from the market, to the library, to the local park.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: With the Dolittle, and other Baby programs under their belts, the tots who follow Julie Aigner-Clark's Baby Einstein series will sidle up to Baby Newton expecting a similar exploration of building blocks to brilliance, but this time there's a wrinkle or two. Animation makes its first appearance, and parents steeped in keep-it-simple culture may object to the springy "I Know My Shapes" song, a departure from classical-only video predecessors.

programme.title: Super Supremes Kids Songs And Nursery Rhymes
programme.desc: The Supremes are a family of Superheroes with multiple superhero powers like telekinesis, teleporting, the power to create fire and ice, invisibility power, time travel, power of strength, telepathy, ability to communicate with animals etc. They love to sing, dance, play, exercise, discover new things and go on adventures every day using their powers when their help is needed.

programme.title: Wheels on the bus Nursery Rhyme and Kids Songs - Bob The Train
programme.desc: Enjoy Bob the Train's nursery rhymes which children love. Learn songs and new words at the same time.

programme.title: Car Wash for Children - Kids Channel

programme.title: Wheels on The Firetruck + More Nursery Rhymes for Kids - Boom Buddies
programme.desc: Enjoy Boom Buddies nursery rhymes for babies and toddlers, including Baby Shark, Fruits Song, and more!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: When a young foal goes missing from a herd of wild horses in Patagonia, Jett and Team Dizzy help a girl named Nayla go on a search and rescue mission in the mountains to find it. A young boy named Daniel in B.C. Canada asks Jett to bring him a tool kit to help him build a treehouse for his dad. The treehouse is a success but a melting glacier causes a flood of the nearby river.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A young boy named Maxim in Kazakhstan gets Jett to bring him a package of Kazahk doughnuts so he can give them to his mom, an astronaut who is traveling to the moon. When a toy jet gets blown off course and becomes lost in the Everglades, an impossible place to find anything, it seems like the young boy who owns it will never get it back; Jett calls Mira's Wild Team for assistance.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A young girl named Tess is excited go to Schiphol Airport in her hometown of Amsterdam, where she will be going on her first airplane ride; Jett brings her a carry-on suitcase, but trouble arises when it goes missing. A mishap clogs a hot spring in Nagano, Japan, causing several new hot springs to appear; Donnie's Build-It Buddies turn the calamity into a great new water park.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A virus disrupts a computer that is needed for a webcast that a girl named Yuna in Busan, South Korea, does with her father; Jett and the Galaxy Wings go into the computer and vanquish the virus. Three Filipina sisters ask Jett to deliver mics and a stand so they can participate in a singing concert; when they are late setting out for the concert, it's a race against time to get them on stage.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett flies to Battambang, Cambodia, to deliver a duck whistle to a girl named Solyna so she can help her parents herd their ducks into a truck; when the ducks escape, Sky scrambles Paul's Police Patrol to help. Jett delivers new basketball shoes to a boy named Manu in Spain who hopes that the shoes will allow him to dunk; when the shoes don't work, Jett and the Galaxy Wings take Manu to Mars.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: When a girl named Louisa in Germany goes to visit her favorite amusement park, she's sad to learn that it is being closed forever; the Super Wings work to give the park a makeover. Grand Albert's Telephoto Transformer is mistakenly delivered to a boy named Marcel who lives in Paris. When the camera makes a beetle grow into a giant insect it's up to Jett and Dizzy's Rescue Riders to save the city.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Grand Albert's Telephoto Transformer is mistakenly delivered to a boy named Marcel who lives in Paris. When the camera makes a beetle grow into a giant insect it's up to Jett and Dizzy's Rescue Riders to save the city. A girl from Bangkok, Thailand, orders a baby carriage to take her kitten in to a famous local market. Chaos ensues when the cat escapes but Dizzy's Rescue Riders arrive to help.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A boy who lives on Mont Saint Michel in France wants to build the biggest and best sandcastle ever. programme.desc: As Sonic begins to chow chili dogs for a snack, he finds a message in the sack from his mother urging him to head to Speedster Island.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Robotnik has his eyes set upon Queen Aleena's crown jewel, but Sonic, Manic and Sonia plan to retrieve the gem before Robotnik.

programme.desc: Sonic, Manic and Sonia find an abandoned baby in an alley and begin to look for the baby's parents. Manic becomes very fond of the child.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik shrinks Sonic and Tails with a shrink ray and puts them into his terrarium. Sonic and Tails escape on the back of a gecko, reverse the shrink ray to restore themselves to normal, then use it to shrink Scratch and Grounder, and put them...

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik takes over a local amusement park called "Mobiusland" and changes the name to "Robotnikland".

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik lures Sonic into a round-the-planet vehicle race called the Mobius 5000 by threatening to foreclose on a loan to an orphanage.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When an undersea world is threatened by Captain Memo and his lobster sub, Sonic spreads a rumor that Memo plans to attack Robotnik next.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Robotnik launches a spy-orb that will uncover the Freedom Fighter's Knothole location, Sonic and Robot launch themselves up to the orbiting spy-sphere aboard a home-made rocket powered by Robotnik's discarded booster engine.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: A welcome party for Prince Frederick is taking place in Rainbow Village, but the guest of honour isn't having any fun at all. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a party planner. // The village is a total mess from the paint that spilled from up above. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a clean-up engineer and starts cleaning with her friends.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: A Flower Festival is underway in Rainbow Village and Ling Ling has called Rainbow Ruby to help her judge the "best flower" contest. programme.desc: Everyone is frightened because some visiting birds keep trying to sit on their heads. According to Chirpee, the birds just enjoy sitting on people's heads. Rainbow Ruby designs hats where the birds can comfortably sit without disturbing the villagers. // The village friends were planning to have some fun with the rainbow fish but they're all disappointed to discover that the lake has frozen over.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: The friends are very tired because Mr. Moon hasn't come to sing them their nightly lullaby. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become an Astronaut and flies to space to look for Mr. Moon with her friends. // In Rainbow Village, a super frantic Thunderbell is high up in the air, trapped inside a giant bubble. Thunderbell got trapped in a giant bubble in the middle of a bubble bath. In order to find out a way to bring Thunderbell back to earth, Rainbow Ruby turns into a scientist.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Gina accidentally broke Felicia's house, leaving Felicia homeless. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become an architect and builds a house that suits Felicia's demands. // Gina is extremely worried. She needs strawberries for the Rainbow Fruit Ice Cream Festival that's starting soon but the strawberries are all mixed in with other red objects.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Thunderbell is sad because he's discovered a new fruit and eaten all of it. Now there's none left and he'll never be able to eat that fruit again. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase and transforms into a farmer. // Thunderbell has a terrible tummy ache. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Microbiologist to find out why Thunderbell is sick. Rainbow Ruby uses a microscope to find a bacterium inside the cheesecake Thunderbell had but Felicia accidentally casts a spell that makes the bacterium gigantic.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling takes Rainbow Ruby to Ellie's cabin where she meets mischievous baby stars that fell from the sky. The baby stars were playing together, got separated from their mother and ended up in Rainbow Village. // Kiki is extremely upset because the jewel Prince Frederick gave her as a gift broke. The friends try to glue the broken pieces together but it doesn't work. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a jewelry designer and tries designing jewelry with the broken pieces.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When Ruby and Choco arrive at the village, they find a very worried looking Ling Ling. Gina, Ellie, and Thunderbell went camping in Rainbow Forest but they saw a monster in the forest, got scared and had to run away. // Ruby is struggling to make a doll with her dad. Ruby and Choco get their suitcase and as Ruby swings her umbrella, there they are, in front of Rainbow fountain. Mayor Ling Ling tells her that today is the day of Princess Kiki's ballet performance.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ruby is looking at shoes that are now too small for her but she is unwilling to throw away. Ling Ling is worried about Thunderbell. His scooter broke so he is not able to carry out his work as a mail carrier. // Gina calls Rainbow Ruby because today is the day to show their appreciation to Mayor Ling Ling. It took a long time for the village friends to prepare an amazing painting for the mayor. Unfortunately, Thunderbell accidentally destroyed the painting while delivering it.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: There is a new menu at the restaurant, which is very popular. There is a long line in front of the restaurant but there weren't enough staff members to serve the villagers the food. Rainbow Ruby turns into a waitress using her magic suitcase and serve tables kindly. // Rainbow Village is full of marbles. The marbles that Rainbow Ruby spilled in her room poured down into the village from up above the sky! Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to transform into a paramedic.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Gina, Thunderbell, and Choco try to cheer Jessy up but their efforts are of no use. While talking to Mayor Ling Ling, Rainbow Ruby realizes that today is the day that Jessy first arrived in Rainbow Village! Jessy was upset that her friends forgot such a meaningful day to her. // Ling Ling has caught a bad cold and was sneezing all over the place. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase and transforms into a doctor and cares for him.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling is worried about the play planned for tonight. There are no costumes ready for the villagers so it's hard to figure out which roles they're playing. Rainbow Ruby transforms into a costume designer and designs costumes for her friends. // It is very windy in Rainbow village and Paige, a paper doll, is flying to wherever the wind takes her. She is so light that she is blown away by the wind. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a fire fighter and rescue Paige.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling is worried that the villagers are all in low spirits. Ruby thinks of fun games to play but the villagers say that they have already played all of the games too many times. Rainbow Ruby transforms into a singer. // Ling Ling is worried because of the "Secret Present Swapping Party" that Thunderbell is preparing. Thunderbell forgot to send out the invitations. Rainbow Ruby turns into a mail carrier and delivers the invitations.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that a Rainbow Ball Tournament is about to start soon but he is worried because the field is covered with pokey pods. Thunderbell, Ellie, and Gina are trying to pick them up and clear the field but it is not easy since the pokey pods are so spikey. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that he lost his glasses. Then Ellie tells her she lost her needles, Gina her hat, and Thunderbell his wheels. Who could have taken away all these things?

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling is waiting for Rainbow Ruby, looking worried. It turns out that Mr. Sloth's best friend Chirpee is depressed. Chirpee wants to fly high but is struggling due to his small wings and lack of means to learn how to fly. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that the dress that the paper doll Paige was planning to wear to Kiki's dance party is torn. Paige very much wants to go to the party but she cannot go without a dress.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: In Rainbow Village, people are busy preparing for a dance marathon, a competition in which all of the villagers participate. Ling Ling is very sad that Ellie decided not to participate. Ellie is not a confident dancer so she doesn't want to participate. // Rainbow Ruby's friends tell her that they are now friends with Felicia. They were playing hide and seek but Felicia is such a good hider that she's refused to come out even though she's won the game.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: While enjoying lunch in the café, the girls are interrupted by some music coming from the gazebo. They head outside and find Sadiebug and Kadiebug wearing badges and standing by a banner and podium. A group of chairs are set up in front of them. The twins begin to announce, and then argue, that they are starting a club - a good citizens club. The girls are shocked as the twins argue with each other all the time.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: With all the Baby Berrykins running around Berry Bitty City, Princess Berrykin decides to build a Day Care Center and playground. But she's worried because it's dull-looking - all grey metal and brown wood. She asks Strawberry whom might be good to help her out. And two names immediately come to her mind - Lemon and Raspberry! The Princess confesses she's always admired their sense of design and style.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: After returning to the café after a walk with her pets, Strawberry is met by Mr. Longface. He's been waiting for her so that they can get started making treats and decorating for Sadiebug's and Kadiebug's party that afternoon. But Custard and Pupcake have enjoyed their time outside so much that they want to continue playing.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry is really touched when her girlfriends and the Berrykins volunteer to help her with the construction of her new marketplace, so when the girls suggest they take charge of designing Strawberry's dream-bedroom to go on the second story, of course Strawberry agrees. While construction is going on, the girls each show Strawberry their individual ideas for the bedroom.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: With time running out before the Grand Opening celebration for the new Marketplace, Strawberry's friends get the idea to invite her favorite singer, superstar CHERRY JAM, to be the guest singer. The girls are blown away when their berryjuice cell phone gets a text message that Cherry accepts their invitation! Strawberry is touched by their surprise, but reminds them that now the town and Marketplace really have to shine!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Cherry Jam is so enjoying staying in Berry Bitty City, that she calls her managers in Big Bitty City and informs them that she is going to stay for a much needed vacation! Strawberry and the girls are thrilled that she will be with them for a little longer, and they do all they can to make their guest comfortable. But Cherry doesn't want to be treated like a guest; she wants to fit in and contribute to the community.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Berry Bitty City is holding its first city-wide talent show! Hearing that it's the music students of superstar Cherry Jam, a talent scout from Big Bitty City plans to show up. Strawberry and her friends excitedly anticipate her arrival.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: With the summer almost over, Blueberry overhears Strawberry talking about a wonderful tropical island and believes her friend is going to surprise them all with a much needed vacation! Blueberry makes the other girls promise to keep the secret until Strawberry reveals the big surprise. Of course, even though they've promised to keep the secret, they can't help but try and suss out what the island's like from every little thing Strawberry does.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: It's the last week of summer and Berry Bitty City is hopping with activity as the girls prepare for their tropical island vacation at Berry Breezy Bay Resort. But just as they're about to leave, bad news: the resort is closed for the season due to berry breezy weather. The girls are disappointed, but Orange isn't giving up. She says if they can't go to the tropical island, maybe they can bring the tropical island here!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: With only a few days of summer left, the girls are about to enjoy their first vacation in their newly-created, tropical beach resort at Berry Bitty Lake, when who should descend upon them but Mavis Maraschino, the comically over-the-top "Entertainment Tonight"-style show host. Mavis has dumped her focus on fashions in favor of an even glitzier show called Lifestyles of the Berry Big Bitty Stars, and she wants her first segment to be about how pop superstar Cherry Jam spends her vacation.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: On a beautiful winter's night, Blueberry reads the Baby Berrykins a story of what happened one winter in Berry Bitty City-a winter that almost wasn't. Just as everyone is ready for winter fun and fashions, a sudden warming melts the snow and ruins their plans. Improvising with snowmen made of shaved ice and cotton puffs, Strawberry and her friends play "Capture the Snowman's Carrot Nose." The Berrykins want to join in the fun, so the girls play against them, with Strawberry refereeing.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: It's another windy winter day, and the postal bees are staying indoors-the wind is too strong for their berry bitty wings. "We don't know when the next mail will get through!" It's bad news for Blueberry, who has been anxiously awaiting the next installment of a Patty Persimmon Detective story. If only she could get to the post office in Berry Bitty Dale where her package is waiting!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry, Cherry and the girls form a new band, Strawberry and the Sweet Beats, and prepare to go on the road to perform at the Opening Ceremony of the Berry Big City Games! While master mechanic Berrykin Bruce turns Cherry's tour bus into the band's hotel-on-wheels, Strawberry and her friends pack for the big trip. But the rest of Berry Bitty City points out that someone needs to run the girls' businesses while they are gone.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Berrykins Ed and Earl report to Princess Berrykin and Strawberry that they are certain there is a monster in the berry patch! They saw something with many noses and many tails making weird noises in the bushes. But upon further investigation by Strawberry and her friends, it is discovered that friendly boy Huckleberry Pie was driving his pet-mobile of orphan dogs through the countryside, took a wrong turn and got stuck near Berry Bitty City.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Blueberry is disappointed in the girls' lack of enthusiasm for the Patti Persimmon mystery novels, her favorite book series. She finds herself missing the company of her fellow Persimmon fan Huckleberry, and thinks up a great way to get him to visit. She invites Huck to co-write a story with her to submit to an online mystery magazine.. Huck eagerly accepts and comes for a visit.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: When Huckleberry and Blueberry's Patti Persimmon-style mystery story is rejected by an online mystery magazine, Blueberry and Huck have to come up with a new way to raise support for Huckleberry's Hotel for Homeless Pets back in Berry Big City. Strawberry suggests they hold a big dog show! Plum makes over-ambitious plans to display talents that her dog does not quite have, trying to teach him complicated dance routines.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry and the girls excitedly plan to put on a "Story Time On Stage" musical play for the Berrykin kids: "Berryella and Prince Berry Charming," directed and choreographed by Plum, with musical direction by Cherry. Strawberry will play Berryella, with Lemon and Blueberry as her comically jealous stepsisters, and costume designer Raspberry as her Fairy Fashionmother.

programme.title: A Craftsman's Legacy
programme.desc: The century old tradition of building the Windsor chair is a practical and elegant pursuit. Host Eric Gorges and master craftsman Curtis Buchanan give the viewer a front seat.

programme.title: A Craftsman's Legacy
programme.desc: Master weaver Jaunita Hofstrom wanted to have a place just for weavers to gather and pursue their love of weaving. She bought a little church around the corner from her house and started living that dream. Host Eric Gorges explores the ins and outs and up and overs of this traditional craft.

programme.title: A Craftsman's Legacy
programme.desc: Cheese, please! Join master cheesemaker Bruce Workman and host Eric Gorges for an inside view of an award winning creamery. Who knew master cheesemakers started their day at 2am?!

programme.title: A Craftsman's Legacy
programme.desc: Experienced naturalist and wilderness survivor, Greg Anderson is also a master bow maker. Host Eric Gorges learns how to craft a traditional bow with Greg as his guide and tests his skills with the bulls-eye.

programme.title: A Craftsman's Legacy
programme.desc: James Gillaspie has been making medieval/Renaissance armor for over 20 years. Host Eric Gorges plays to his base as a fellow metal shaper. James and Eric do a little jousting and a lot of shop-talk!

programme.title: A Craftsman's Legacy
programme.desc: Theadra Fleming hands over the needle and thread to host Eric Gorges as this quilter explains the African American tradition of quilting with a focus on colors, symbolism and the history of African textiles.

programme.title: A Craftsman's Legacy
programme.desc: Best foot (ware) forward! Host Eric Gorges picks up the hammer and nail to try his hand at being a shoemaker. Master shoemakers Jesse Moore and Marika Verploegh Chass give expert guidance along the way.

programme.title: A Craftsman's Legacy
programme.desc: Oh, the freedom of two wheels! Host Eric Gorges discovers how master bicycle maker, Stephen Bilenky, brazes bikes and has made a living for over 30 years doing exactly what he loves.

programme.title: A Craftsman's Legacy
programme.desc: Host Eric Gorges visits Alan Kaniarz, an innovator in the world of furniture design. Together they discuss the love of making furniture, environmentally conscious.

programme.title: A Craftsman's Legacy
programme.desc: Nothing fires up host Eric Gorges like working with molten metal. In this episode, Eric and master sand caster Scott Nelles, create a bronze and aluminum ray gun.

programme.title: A Craftsman's Legacy
programme.desc: This episode is all about hoof to hat. Meet Maple Smith, a retired schoolteacher who raises her own alpacas, sheers their coats, and spins yarn. Eric gets out of his comfort zone and starts knitting!

programme.title: A Craftsman's Legacy
programme.desc: Hey dummy! In this episode host Eric Gorges visits famous master ventriloquist puppet maker, Tim Selberg. Here, viewers are shown the behind-the-scenes genius of creating the intricate (and maybe magical) mechanization process of puppet making.

programme.title: A Craftsman's Legacy
programme.desc: Duck! Here comes some of the most exquisitely carved duck decoys host Eric Gorges ever laid eyes on. Meet Ben Heinemann, master carver, who teaches Eric a thing or two about the real thing.

programme.title: A Craftsman's Legacy
programme.desc: Seth Gould could easily be called one of the rock-stars of metalsmithing. Host Eric Gorges heads South to the Appalachian Mountains in North Carolina and the famed Penland School of Crafts to learn from this amazing craftsman. In this episode Eric and Seth make a breathtaking hammer.

programme.title: A Craftsman's Legacy
programme.desc: In this episode, host Eric Gorges meets Dan and Jael Rattigan at their chocolate factory in Asheville, NC. The Rattigans truly craft from bean to bar, letting Eric live out his lifetime dream of working with chocolate.
